zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf於1369年12月22日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽時，他的父親William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf20歲，母親Agnes Poynings20歲。他於1382年7月8日與Anice de Cromwell在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1408年2月18日在英國越可爾布拉哈姆享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf于1369年12月22日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽时，他的父亲William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf20岁，母亲Agnes Poynings20岁。他于1382年7月8日与Anice de Cromwell在英国英格兰林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1408年2月18日在英国越可爾布拉哈姆享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf was born on 22 December 1369, in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, was 20 and his mother, Agnes Poynings, was 20. He married Anice de Cromwell on 8 July 1382, in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 18 February 1408, in Bramham, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf est né le 22 décembre 1369, à Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes Poynings, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Anice de Cromwell le 8 juillet 1382, à Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 février 1408, à Bramham, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf am 22. Dezember 1369 in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf 20 und seine Mutter Agnes Poynings 20. Er hat am 8. Juli 1382 in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Anice de Cromwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Februar 1408 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Bramham, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf è nato il il 22 dicembre 1369 nel Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Poynings, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Anice de Cromwell il 8 luglio 1382, nel Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 febbraio 1408, nel Bramham, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolfが1369年12月22日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアパーツ オフ リンドセイで生まれた時，父William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolfは20歳，母Agnes Poyningsは20歳であった。1382年7月8日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアパーツ オフ リンドセイでAnice de Cromwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年2月18日にイギリスヨークシュアイアブラムハムで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf(이)가 1369년 12월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Poynings(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1382년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지에서 Anice de Cromwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년 2월 18일 영국 요르크실르 브램함에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에 묻혔다.

pt.22 December 1369–18 February 1408: 22 de dezembro de 1369–18 de fevereiro de 1408
pt.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf nasceu em 22 de dezembro de 1369, em Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Poynings, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Anice de Cromwell em 8 de julho de 1382, em Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1408, em Bramham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf родился 22 декабря 1369 г. в местности парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Poynings, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Anice de Cromwell 8 июля 1382 г. в местности парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 февраля 1408 г. в местности брамхам, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Anice de Cromwell el 8 de julio de 1382, en Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1408, en Bramham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
